title: Dental Hygienist
description: As a Dental Hygienist at AstraZeneca, you'll provide preventive dental care and patient education in a professional, supportive environment.
responsibilities: Perform dental cleanings and scaling procedures
Take and develop dental X-rays and intraoral photographs
Educate patients on oral hygiene and disease prevention
Apply dental sealants and fluoride treatments
Document findings and communicate with dentists regarding patient status
Maintain infection control standards and sterilize instruments

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
